---
title: "Future‑Fit Business Benchmark"
Xauthor: "Future‑Fit Foundation"
Xdate: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: bookdown::gitbook
Xoutput: bookdown::html_book
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: ["references.bib"]
biblio-style: apalike
nocite: '@*'
link-citations: yes
github-repo: futurefitbiz/infohub
description: "This is the Future‑Fit Business Benchmark Info Hub."
---

# (PART\*) Getting Started {-}

# Welcome {-#welcome}

&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;[Español / Spanish](https://es.benchmark.futurefitbusiness.org)&nbsp;&nbsp;![](assets/flags/spain.svg){width=20px}&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;[Português / Portuguese](https://pt.benchmark.futurefitbusiness.org)&nbsp;&nbsp;![](assets/flags/portugal.svg){width=20px}

&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;&emsp;[中文 / Chinese](https://cn.benchmark.futurefitbusiness.org)&nbsp;&nbsp;![](assets/flags/china.svg){width=20px}

<div class="subtitle">Release 2.3 - June 2021
</div>

<div class="callout-tip">
This is the first online version of the Future-Fit Business Benchmark. Please let us know if you come across any errors or have any suggestions for improvement. You can reach our team at [info@futurefitbusiness.org](mailto:info@futurefitbusiness.org?subject=Release%202.2%20Methodology%20Guide). Thanks as ever for your help...
</div>
